task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome experiments (flags) are enabled for stability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the chrome://flags page showing 'smooth-scrolling', 'enable-parallel-downloading', and 'enable-quic' with their dropdowns set to 'Enabled' (usually highlighted in blue).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome font sizes are adjusted for readability on large monitors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the chrome://settings/fonts page showing the 'Font size' (or Standard font) set to 20 and the 'Minimum font size' slider set to 14.

task_completion.description: Verify that site-specific geolocation and notification permissions are set for emergency mapping/alert portals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://settings/content/location and chrome://settings/content/notifications (or specific site settings pages) showing URLs added to the 'Allowed' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 20 existing bookmarks are organized into 4 specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) showing exactly 4 folders in the left sidebar (including 'Personal (Off-Duty)') and bookmarks placed inside them rather than loose in the Bookmarks Bar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific homepage and startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://settings/appearance showing the Home button enabled with 'https://www.weather.gov' as the custom web address, AND chrome://settings/onStartup showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected with 'https://www.weather.gov', 'https://earthquake.usgs.gov', and 'https://www.fema.gov' listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default download directory is set correctly and the prompt to save is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://settings/downloads showing the Location set to '/home/ga/Documents/Dispatch_Records' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify that all password and autofill settings are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://settings/passwords and chrome://settings/autofill showing toggles like 'Offer to save passwords', 'Auto Sign-in', 'Save and fill payment methods', and 'Save and fill addresses' turned OFF.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings rather than directly modifying Chrome preference JSON files via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through Chrome's settings menus, bookmark manager, and flags pages, rather than using terminal commands like 'sed' or 'jq' on ~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Google Chrome application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the standard Chrome browser UI elements (omnibox, tabs, settings sidebar) and not a mock HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually opened and read the standard document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/dispatch_terminal_standard.txt' in a text editor (like gedit, nano, or cat in the terminal) to read the requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Chrome flags to be enabled: 'smooth-scrolling', 'enable-parallel-downloading', 'enable-quic'. Expected font sizes: default 20, minimum 14. Expected homepage: 'https://www.weather.gov'. Expected startup pages: 'https://www.weather.gov', 'https://earthquake.usgs.gov', 'https://www.fema.gov'. Expected download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Dispatch_Records'. One of the 4 bookmark folders must be named 'Personal (Off-Duty)'.
